justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions and preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and then confirmed the user's chosen slot.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, providing relevant options and booking the appointment without unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, leading to a positive customer experience and successful appointment booking.
